A new name, with the same passion—just a clearer vision. 🤍 Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of being a part of so many beautiful makeup journeys. As my heart and work continue to focus on creating timeless bridal looks, it felt like the right time for my brand to reflect that. I’m so excited to share that @makeupbyaashnaguglani is now @bridesbyaashna. ✨ This change is more than just a new handle—it’s a commitment to every bride who trusts me to make her feel confident, radiant, and truly herself on her most special day.
